title: TokenPath adds source-level attribution after an AI answer
friendlyTitle: TokenPath shows which source text supports an AI claim
summary: TokenPath offers an API that maps claims in an existing model answer back to exact spans in a source document using an attention-based attribution pass. The company says it works after generation with output from different models and returns a source span plus a confidence score for each claim.
friendlySummary: The service links parts of an AI answer to the exact words in a source document.
whyItMatters: More precise citations could make document assistants easier to audit in research, finance and other evidence-heavy work. Attribution confidence is not proof that a claim is correct, so important outputs still need source review and independent evaluation.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can make answers easier to check, but people should still read the source before trusting an important claim.
